SEARCH
Package jpa.dto.concert

Record Class ResponseOrganizerConcertDto

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
jpa.dto.concert.ResponseOrganizerConcertDto
public record ResponseOrganizerConcertDto(String concertTitle, String concertArtist, Instant concertCreatedAt, Instant concertDate, String concertStatus, String placeAddress, Integer placeZipCode, String placeCity, Integer placeCapacity, Integer ticketSold, Integer ticketQuantity) extends Record
Organizer concert listing projection with place and ticket aggregates.

  • Constructor Details

    • ResponseOrganizerConcertDto

      public ResponseOrganizerConcertDto(String concertTitle, String concertArtist, Instant concertCreatedAt, Instant concertDate, String concertStatus, String placeAddress, Integer placeZipCode, String placeCity, Integer placeCapacity, Integer ticketSold, Integer ticketQuantity)
      Creates an instance of a ResponseOrganizerConcertDto record class.
      Parameters:
      concertTitle - the value for the concertTitle record component
      concertArtist - the value for the concertArtist record component
      concertCreatedAt - the value for the concertCreatedAt record component
      concertDate - the value for the concertDate record component
      concertStatus - the value for the concertStatus record component
      placeAddress - the value for the placeAddress record component
      placeZipCode - the value for the placeZipCode record component
      placeCity - the value for the placeCity record component
      placeCapacity - the value for the placeCapacity record component
      ticketSold - the value for the ticketSold record component
      ticketQuantity - the value for the ticketQuantity record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
